svg.text: THA Portfolio (All 5 Projects) — Annual DS vs. NOI (2024–2034) | Balloons Amortized | 15% Vacancy
Fully-amortizing DS $6,199K/yr · NOI haircut 15% vacancy · vs. regular DS $3,889K/yr · +$2,310K/yr to eliminate $33.0M balloon risk · 2025 DSCR 0.44x
Pink band = annual shortfall (NOI < total DS)
⚠ CanyonLands = conduit bond, no audited financials (THA Board memo only)
NOI assumes 15% vacancy rate applied to all projects. Fully-amortizing DS: VooDoo $1,647K CanyonLands $2,303K VA Placer $613K Sunnyside $1,003K Shandoka $633K.
Sources: 2023 & 2024 Town of Telluride Audited Financials; THA Board memo June 2024. CanyonLands = conduit (WI PFA), no audited financials. 2025+ = TABOR model + 3% annual NOI growth.
